title: SWEny Workflow
description: A declarative AI agent orchestration workflow.

description.description: Optional description of the workflow's purpose.

entry.description: Node ID where execution begins. MUST reference a key in 'nodes'.

nodes.description: Map of node ID to Node definition. Keys are referenced by 'entry' and edge 'from'/'to' fields.

edges.description: Directed edges connecting nodes. Define execution flow and routing conditions.

instruction.description: Natural language instruction for the AI model. This is the primary directive for this step.

skills.description: Skill IDs available to this node. Determines which tools the AI model can invoke.

output.description: Optional JSON Schema for structured output. When present, the executor MUST request output conforming to this schema.

from.description: Source node ID. MUST reference a key in 'nodes'.

to.description: Target node ID. MUST reference a key in 'nodes'.

when.description: Natural language condition. Evaluated by the AI model against accumulated context to determine routing.

max_iterations.description: Maximum times this edge can be followed. Enables bounded retry loops. REQUIRED for self-loops (from === to).
